description_long: This is a two-story rectangular house with a flat roof and a beige brick exterior. The front facade features multiple white-framed windows, a central door, and a small awning above one window. The house is surrounded by a white railing and includes a fenced backyard with outdoor furniture, a swing set, a fire pit, and a potted plant. The rear of the house has a large window and a deck area, while the side yard is equipped with a patio table and chairs. The overall design is simple and modern, with clean lines and minimal ornamentation.
description: A modern, two-story beige brick house with a flat roof, white-framed windows, and a fenced yard featuring outdoor furniture and play equipment.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, several white-framed windows, a small awning, and the front railing.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the large rear window, deck area, patio furniture, and the fenced backyard.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard with a swing set, fire pit, outdoor seating, and a potted plant.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing additional windows, the deck, and the backyard play area.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical rows with some large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Central door with a small awning, steps, and a simple white railing
